programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Johnny English, a bumbling British agent, teams up with an Interpol agent and attempts to locate a French billionaire who has stolen the crown jewels.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 42
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 9
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 116-117
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 31
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 9
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 10
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 83
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 10
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 11
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. programme.title: Live: Tour de France Men
programme.desc: Coverage from the fifth stage of this year's race, a 158.3km route starting in Lannemezan and ending in Pau. Remco Evenepoel became the third Belgian stage winner at this stage last year after he won a 33km individual time trial race around the city of Caen on the Northwest coast of France. programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 253
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools.

programme.title: The Heir to the Throne - EP 27 / 家族荣耀之继承者
programme.desc: Gao Jun finally finds evidence confirming that Gao Cheng met Shouyi before his death. Zhibin discovers that Shouyi has intentions to change his will and realises that Shouyi already knew his true identity.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 581 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 16 / 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: The orchestra hopes to persuade Xiao Cheng to become its conductor through a video performance. Although Xiao Cheng criticizes the orchestra harshly and dismisses it as worthless, Zhang Tie responds forcefully and defends the musicians' dignity.

programme.title: Love In A Pot - EP 6 / 围炉开吃
programme.desc: From bamboo shoot and salted fish broths in the south to goat hotpot in the central region, Vietnamese hotpot is more than a meal it’s about sharing the moment. In this episode, Seow Sin Nee and Juin Teh join Lyu Linxuan at a Vietnamese hotpot spot in Singapore, playing games while exploring bold flavours and uncovering a few fun surprises.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 8 / 至死不渝
programme.desc: Meijiao admits to impersonating Xinran online and dating Beichen. Hongtao is pleased to learn that Manning wants to date Shuheng and even asks Keying to help, leaving her conflicted. A male corpse is found naked in a hotel room, and the police suspect Chinese Canadian woman Eve. The police arrive at the airport to arrest her. When Shuheng tries to stop her, she accuses him of sexual assault.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Brazil takes on Norway at New York New Jersey Stadium in the World Cup Round of 16. Brazil secured a thrilling 2-1 win over Japan on Gabriel Martinelli's 96th-minute goal. Erling Haaland's 86th-minute strike led Norway past Cote d'Ivoire 2-1.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Mexico faces England in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Mexico City Stadium. Mexico defeated Ecuador 2-0 with goals scored by Raul Jimenez and Julian Quinones. England won against Congo DR 2-1 with both goals scored by Harry Kane.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Australia faces Egypt in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. Egypt finished second in Group G after a 1-1 draw with Iran. Australia ranked second after playing to a 0-0 draw against Paraguay in their final Group D match.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina faces Cabo Verde in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. Cabo Verde finished second in Group H after a 0-0 draw with Saudi Arabia. Argentina ranked first following a 3-1 win over Jordan in their final Group J match.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Portugal plays Spain in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. Portugal advanced after a 2-1 win over Croatia with a penalty by Cristiano Ronaldo; Spain entered following a 3-0 shutout of Austria led by a Mikel Oyarzabal brace.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: USA and Belgium meet in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Seattle Stadium. USA beat Bosnia and Herzegovina 2-0, with an 82nd-minute goal by Malik Tillman. Belgium beat Senegal 3-2, with Youri Tielemans scoring a penalty in extra time.

programme.desc: Program realiti kekeluargaan yang menggabungkan 5 buah keluarga selebriti. Setiap anak dalam sebuah keluarga selebriti akan diberi tugasan. Saksikan bagaimana kerjasama yang ditunjukkan mereka sekeluarga.

programme.title: My Famous Ex Boyfriend Ep17
programme.desc: Kesan daripada pengambilan dos berlebihan, Haque ditahan di hospital di mana beritanya tersebar dengan cepat dan memberi kesan pada karier Haque. Hubungan Sameera sekali lagi diuji dengan kejujuran.

programme.title: MeleTOP S14 Ep37
programme.desc: Rancangan hiburan yang padat dengan segala yang 'trendy' lagi sensasi, dari pentas hiburan tempatan dan antarabangsa. Dihoskan oleh NABIL AHMAD dan rakan pengacaranya pastinya kelakar dan 'meletop'!

programme.title: Hlive! Ep38
programme.desc: Yang Hip, Yang Hangat! Rancangan berita hiburan dalam dan luar negara secara eksklusif di hlive! Hiburan Tanpa Henti!

programme.title: Dari Mata Turun Ke Hati Ep12
programme.desc: Farhan yang disangka telah meninggal, kembali sebagai kaunselor kerjaya Iris di kolej. Jai cemburu dengan kemunculan Farhan. Iris meyakinkan Jai bahawa hanya Jai seorang dihati Iris.

programme.title: Living With My Manager Ep02
programme.desc: Living with My Manager mengikuti bakat Talk To My Manager S2 tinggal bersama pengurus yang juga ibu bapa, memaparkan realiti, konflik dan emosi mengejar impian.

programme.title: Diam Tanda Setuju
programme.desc: Kisah dua sahabat baik yang berhadapan dengan konflik perhubungan di saat mereka mula panik memikirkan usia mereka yang semakin meningkat tetapi belum bertemu jodoh.

programme.title: MegaDrama: Ikatan Terlarang Ep18
programme.desc: Azura dikhianati suami dan sahabatnya, lalu berdepan rahsia gelap keluarga yang menghancurkannya. Mampukah dia bangkit menuntut keadilan dan menemukan semula kekuatan diri?

programme.title: Sunshine By My Side Ep15
programme.desc: A well-known advertising director and a newcomer in the industry randomly cross paths and eventually develop a bond, propelling them on a journey of sublime growth and budding romance.

programme.title: expeRIAnce:Fantasy Escape Ep07
programme.desc: A realty travelogue concept of journey with celebrities to explore and experience the excitement of world renown events that take place every year.

programme.title: Diari Big Stage Rocketfuel Ep06
programme.desc: Saksikan persiapan peserta-peserta Big Stage Rocketfuel menghadapi konsert mingguan.

programme.title: Mandul Bukan Pilihan Ep26
programme.desc: Kebahagiaan pasangan suami isteri, Aldi dan Billa diragut apabila impian mereka memiliki zuriat semakin pudar. Kerana terdesak, mereka memilih jalan yang melangkahi takdir Tuhan.

programme.title: Kapsul Podcast Talk to My Manager S2 Ep10
programme.desc: Kapsul Podcast Talk to My Manager S2

programme.title: (L) AWANI 7:45/ Sinar AWANI
programme.desc: Sinar AWANI membawakan perkembangan berita-berita utama.

programme.title: Hlive! Ep39
programme.desc: Yang Hip, Yang Hangat! Rancangan berita hiburan dalam dan luar negara secara eksklusif di hlive! Hiburan Tanpa Henti!

programme.title: Wish List Ep05
programme.desc: Ummi mendesak Safa mengambil lima 'wish list jar' peninggalan Umair, namun Safa hanya akan membukanya jika menemui lelaki mirip arwah kekasihnya. Demi ibunya, Safa akur pulang ke rumah.

programme.title: MegaDrama: Ikatan Terlarang Ep19
programme.desc: Azura dikhianati suami dan sahabatnya, lalu berdepan rahsia gelap keluarga yang menghancurkannya. Mampukah dia bangkit menuntut keadilan dan menemukan semula kekuatan diri?

programme.title: Gempak Most Wanted 2026 Ep20
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan carta interaktif mingguan memfokuskan segala yang trending, viral & sensasi di semua platform digital.

programme.title: Diari Big Stage Rocketfuel Ep07
programme.desc: Saksikan persiapan peserta-peserta Big Stage Rocketfuel menghadapi konsert mingguan.

programme.title: Debunk
programme.desc: Hakim mempunyai youtube channel nya sendiri bertujuan untuk membongkar kewujudan hantu. Satu hari, Hakim menerima satu pesanan ringkas yang menjemputnya untuk bermalam di sebuah hospital berhantu.

programme.title: The Maid 2 Ep11
programme.desc: Suhana dan kawan-kawan berjaya lepaskan Inspektor Kasri dari bilik kurungan. Remy dapat satu petunjuk baru mengenai identiti pembunuh yang sebenarnya. Perangkap dipasang tetapi Qina pula cuba menghalang.

programme.title: Coffee For All Ep02
programme.desc: Berlatarbelakangkan sebuah cafe di Jakarta bernama Coffee For All, ikuti kisah pemilik cafe, Cici Merlyn bersama-sama kru cafe: Edu, Anya dan Retno yang menjadi tulang belakang Coffee For All.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek Ep07
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa bermalam di rumah yang dikhuatiri berbahaya dan keras.

programme.title: MegaDrama: Cina Buta Ep12
programme.desc: Suami isteri yang selalu bergaduh tetapi saling menyayangi. Sukar untuk mereka berkahwin semula kerana sudah tiga kali bercerai. Apa yang membolehkan mereka berkahwin semula adalah menggunakan 'Cina Buta'.

programme.title: Perang Jantina Ep06
programme.desc: Pasukan lelaki dan pasukan wanita bersaing antara satu sama lain menyelesaikan tugasan dan cabaran untuk membuktikan jatina mana yang lebih unggul. Tema minggu ini Rockers.

programme.title: Sunshine By My Side Ep15
programme.desc: A well-known advertising director and a newcomer in the industry randomly cross paths and eventually develop a bond, propelling them on a journey of sublime growth and budding romance.

programme.title: Kids Nowadays Ep05
programme.desc: Jaafar membantu menyelamatkan Eddy yang hampir lemas sewaktu aktiviti perkhemahan yang mereka sertai. Namun atas hasutan Syafiq, Eddy menjadi angkuh dan tidak mengenang budi.

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

programme.desc: Sophie secretly invites three of her mother's former lovers to her upcoming wedding. In doing so, she hopes to discover the true identity of her biological father before the ceremony takes place.

programme.desc: When grieving architect David moves into a new apartment, he finds the spirit of the last tenant, workaholic doctor Elizabeth, still very much in-residence.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg Focker, a hapless American nurse, ends up like a hamster on a wheel of misadventures in a desperate attempt to win the favour of his girlfriend's parents.
